tool_args.raw_text: Making Strides Against Breast Cancer Walk, October 2024 - Empowering Women in Transportation (EWT) led the MTA's participation in the Making Strides for Breast Cancer Walk. The goal was to raise $30,000 and we raised over $40,000.

tool_args.label: Veterans ERG Veterans Day Ceremony
tool_args.raw_text: Veterans ERG Veteran Day Ceremony and Parade, November 2024 - The Veteran ERG held their annual Veteran Day Ceremony to commemorate the service and sacrifice of our Armed Service Veterans. MTA Pipes and Drums, as well as The Color Guard, participated in the observance. Additionally, Veterans took part in the New York City Veterans Day Parade.
